children.text: In this clip, Montejano discusses the gender discrimination present in the Brown Berets as well as specific protest actions the organization took that she was a part of.

citation: "Gender in the Brown Berets," from Diana Montejano Oral History Interview with Steve Arionus and Vinicio Sinta,  June 29, 2016, San Antonio, Civil Rights in Black and Brown Interview Database, https://crbb.tcu.edu/clips/4221/gender-in-the-brown-berets, accessed May 10, 2026.
label: 13: Gender in the Brown Berets
